text:
games/ioquake3-devel
- Update engine from SVN r1936 to r2064
- ~100 bug fixes, improvements and cleanups
- Improved wide screen UI support

games/iourbanterror
- Follow ioquake3-devel engine update

games/openarena
- Update engine source 20 to 21 (both based on ioq3 SVN r1910)
- Adds dynamic light flares
- New specular alpha algorithm
